query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lojas) as total_lojas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lojas WHERE nome LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%Test%' OR nome LIKE '%TEST%' OR nome LIKE '%exemplo%' OR nome LIKE '%demo%' OR nome LIKE '%Batch%' OR nome LIKE '%Import%' OR email LIKE '%@test.com' OR email LIKE '%@example.com') as lojas_teste,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gestores) as total_gestores,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gestores g JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%@test.com' OR u.name LIKE '%Test%' OR u.name LIKE '%test%') as gestores_teste;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lojas WHERE nome LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%Test%' OR nome LIKE '%TEST%' OR nome LIKE '%exemplo%' OR nome LIKE '%demo%' OR nome LIKE '%Batch%' OR nome LIKE '%Import%' OR email LIKE '%@test.com' OR email LIKE '%@example.com') as lojas_teste,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gestores) as total_gestores,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gestores g JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%@test.com' OR u.name LIKE '%Test%' OR u.name LIKE '%test%') as gestores_teste;
